name: 2marchi
description: 2M ARCHI — monorepo (front public site, admin dashboard, back API)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n back,front -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix back" "npm run dev --prefix front"
scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix back && npm i --prefix front
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix front && npm run build --prefix back
